programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Ciertos estudiosos afirman que los obeliscos pudieron haber servido para alimentar una tecnología que permitió la comunicación con dioses procedentes de las estrellas.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: MUFON es una organización dedicada a la investigación científica de ovnis y otros encuentros inexplicables, que podría tener pruebas de la existencia de extraterrestres.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Los impactos de meteoritos han alterado significativamente la Tierra, pero, ¿y si fue una inteligencia alienígena la que dirigió a propósito fragmentos de cuerpos celestes al planeta?

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Existe la posibilidad de que haya habido contactos entre los extraterrestres y altos funcionarios del Gobierno estadounidense.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: El vasto territorio virgen de Alaska es bien conocido por sus desapariciones misteriosas, anomalías electromagnéticas, historias de seres extraños y avistamientos de ovnis.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Encuentros aterradores a 40 000 pies de altura. Pilotos relatan cómo los ovnis tomaron el control de sus aeronaves. Aviones enormes que desaparecieron en el aire. Las experiencias de pilotos con ovnis desde los albores de la aviación.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Las enormes estructuras megalíticas de origen misterioso que se hallan en Malta podrían estar relacionadas con leyendas locales de visitas de alienígenas y seres híbridos gigantes.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: El programa visita los diez lugares del mundo más relevantes por sus pirámides, desde un valle en Perú que oculta 250 de estas estructuras a una ciudad griega con ruinas misteriosas de casi 5000 años de antigüedad, pasando, claro está, por Egipto.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Una selección de los 10 artefactos más misteriosos del mundo, desde extraños discos ranurados encontrados en una cueva en China hasta una antigua computadora griega y una increíble calavera de cristal desenterrada en México.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Una lista con las 10 islas más misteriosas en el mundo. Estos lugares increíbles podrían contener pruebas de visitas extraterrestres.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: El programa hace una cuenta regresiva de los diez avistamientos de ovnis más espectaculares, entre los que habrá naves interestelares de todo tipo.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: La vida de Edgar Cayce, a quien llamaban "el profeta durmiente". Originario de una zona rural del sur de los Estados Unidos, este humilde sanador legó a la humanidad las visiones que tuvo sobre el pasado y el futuro del planeta.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Los investigadores recorren el mundo en busca de evidencias para determinar si la vida en la Tierra comenzó en el espacio. Otra gran interrogante que intentan responder es si la raza humana de otras generaciones antiguas recibió ayuda extraterrestre para avanzar en materia tecnológica.

programme.title: La evidencia está entre nosotros
programme.desc: Tony y su equipo analizan luces extrañas en Noruega, un posible dinosaurio en el Congo y la fuerza sobrehumana de una niña rusa de 12 años.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Extraños encuentros en momentos determinantes de la historia y mitos alrededor de dioses que intervienen en asuntos humanos, componen los primeros relatos sobre encuentros con extraterrestres.

programme.title: Alienígenas ancestrales
programme.desc: Culturas de todo el mundo han creído durante miles de años que existen portales dimensionales diseminados por la Tierra, a través de los cuales han entrado criaturas de lugares lejanos del universo.

programme.title: Live: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: The debate is the story in this fast-paced, half-hour series hosted by former Washington Post sportswriters Tony Kornheiser and Michael Wilbon. The pair engage in high-energy discussions, conduct interviews and often argue over topics not even related to sports. Other sports reporters appear as guests and offer opinions on the top stories of the day.

programme.title: Live: NBA Countdown
programme.desc: "NBA Countdown" serves as the primer for game telecasts on the ESPN family of networks. It's highlighted by a lively roundtable discussion and debate of the top storylines around the league. Seats at the table are reserved for folks in ESPN's stable of NBA hosts and analysts, with the latter group imparting wisdom based on their many years of playing experience.

programme.title: Live: NBA Basketball
programme.desc: Cavaliers host the Hawks at Rocket Arena in a crucial Postseason positioning clash. Donovan Mitchel and the Cavs aim to break the 1-1 seasons series tie against a surging Hawks squad. Both look for critical win to bolster late-season playoff seeding.

programme.title: Live: NBA Basketball
programme.desc: Spurs host the Trail Blazers at Frost Bank Center. Both teams look to break 1-1 season series tie. The Spurs and the Trail Blazers each hold a road victory and aim for significant wins as they aim to build momentum for their future matchups.

programme.title: La reina del flow
programme.desc: Yeimy Montoya paga una injusta condena en Nueva York tras haber sido engañada por el hombre que amaba. Por lo tanto, hace un pacto con las autoridades judiciales para capturar al hombre que asesinó a su familia.

programme.title: Pantanal
programme.desc: José Leôncio, hacendado del Pantanal, deja a una joven embarazada en una visita a Río de Janeiro. Ella va a vivir con él al Pantanal, pero es infeliz y decide volver a la ciudad con su hijo. Veinte años después, este va en busca de su padre.

programme.title: Jesús
programme.desc: La trayectoria de Jesucristo antes de la resurrección. Sus milagros y el calvario de la cruz. Las vidas de quienes fueron curados por Jesucristo y quiénes eran los apóstoles.

programme.title: Destinos cruzados
programme.desc: Toprak despierta de un coma tras cinco años sin recordar nada de su pasado, y regresa a una familia que no reconoce, incluida su prometida de toda la vida y un niño que vive con él. Sin embargo, su amnesia lo mantiene en una incertidumbre constante.

programme.title: La luz de mi vida
programme.desc: Tras la muerte de su esposo Hakan, Elif descubre que él llevaba una doble vida y tenía una hija con una mujer llamada Firat.

programme.title: Bajo el mismo cielo
programme.desc: La historia de Carlos Martínez, un padre mexicano indocumentado que vive en Los Ángeles, un hombre trabajador y honrado que lucha para darle una mejor vida a sus dos hijos Luis y Rodrigo, pero su mayor temor es ser deportado y perder a su familia.

programme.title: Live: The Leadoff Spot
programme.desc: Co-hosted by a combination of veteran baseball analysts - Steve Phillips, Xavier Scruggs and Eduardo Pérez - the program will deliver expert commentary, plus interviews with baseball newsmakers and club personnel.

programme.title: Live: MLB Central
programme.desc: MLB Network's first-ever regular-season morning show features hosts Robert Flores, Mark DeRosa and Lauren Shehadi reporting from Studio 21, named in honor of Hall of Famer and humanitarian Roberto Clemente. Updates and context on the latest news, extensive on-field highlights, and long-form conversations with guests, celebrities and insiders from around baseball are presented each weekday morning.

programme.title: Live: MLB Now
programme.desc: The hourlong weekday afternoon "MLB Now" presents the day's top stories in baseball by spanning the sport's cultural divide. Host Brian Kenny discusses the issues and provides analysis, with a bent toward modern analytics to prove his points. The series also features interviews with personalities throughout the game, and viewer opinions are welcome as well via social media polls.

programme.title: Will & Grace

programme.title: Will & Grace

programme.title: Will & Grace

programme.title: Will & Grace

programme.title: Will & Grace

programme.title: Will & Grace

programme.title: Will & Grace

programme.title: Will & Grace

programme.title: The French Connection
programme.desc: New York Detective Popeye Doyle (Gene Hackman) and his partner (Roy Scheider) chase a French heroin smuggler.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Ladybug is an unlucky assassin who's determined to do his job peacefully after one too many gigs has gone off the rails. Fate, however, may have other plans as his latest mission puts him on a collision course with lethal adversaries from around the globe -- all with connected yet conflicting objectives -- on the world's fastest train.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time... In Hollywood
programme.desc: Actor Rick Dalton gained fame and fortune by starring in a 1950s television Western, but is now struggling to find meaningful work in a Hollywood that he doesn't recognize anymore. He spends most of his time drinking and palling around with Cliff Booth, his easygoing best friend and longtime stunt double. Rick also happens to live next door to Roman Polanski and Sharon Tate -- the filmmaker and bu

programme.desc: A man and his brother-in-law plan to steal a priceless diamond from the Brooklyn Museum. However, almost as soon as they get their hands on the loot and prepare to transfer it to an African diplomat,

programme.title: Surf Party
programme.desc: An Arizona gal (Patricia Morrow) and her friends enjoy sun, sand and romance when they drive out to California for a surfing vacation.

programme.title: Soup to Nuts
programme.desc: Two guys and a girl run into Mexican rebels and lots of fires.

programme.title: Gentlemen Prefer Blondes
programme.desc: Lorelei Lee (Marilyn Monroe) is a beautiful showgirl engaged to be married to the wealthy Gus Esmond (Tommy Noonan), much to the disapproval of Gus' rich father, Esmond Sr., who thinks that Lorelei is just after his money. When Lorelei goes on a cruise accompanied only by her best friend, Dorothy Shaw (Jane Russell), Esmond Sr. hires Ernie Malone (Elliott Reid), a private detective, to follow her

programme.title: Carmen Jones
programme.desc: Screen version of the musical Carmen Jones, which adapted Bizet's opera Carmen for an African-American cast. A soldier falls for Dandridge, a seductive factory worker. The lovers flee after the soldier kills his sergeant, but Carmen's taunting faithlessness drives her lover to a crime of passion.

programme.title: Can-Can
programme.desc: Parisian nightclub owner Simone Pistache (Shirley MacLaine) is known for her performances of the can-can, a provocative dance recently outlawed for being immoral. Though her dancing delights patrons to no end, it also attracts the ire of the self-righteous Judge Philippe Forrestier (Louis Jourdan), who aims to punish her. The judge hatches a plot to photograph Simone in the act and ends up falling

programme.title: Moulin Rouge
programme.desc: A celebration of love and creative inspiration takes place in the infamous, gaudy and glamorous Parisian nightclub, at the cusp of the 20th century. A young poet (Ewan McGregor), who is plunged into the heady world of Moulin Rouge, begins a passionate affair with the club's most notorious and beautiful star (Nicole Kidman).

programme.title: Barb & Star Go to Vista Del Mar
programme.desc: Lifelong friends Barb and Star embark on the adventure of a lifetime when they decide to leave their small Midwestern town for the first time ever.

programme.title: The Heat
programme.desc: FBI Special Agent Sarah Ashburn (Sandra Bullock) is a methodical investigator with a long-standing reputation for excellence -- and arrogance. In contrast, foul-mouthed, hot-tempered detective Shannon Mullins (Melissa McCarthy) goes with her gut instincts and street smarts to remove criminals from the streets of Boston. Sparks fly when these polar opposites have to work together to capture a drug

programme.title: Bringing Down the House
programme.desc: Lawyer Peter Sanderson (Steve Martin) wants to dive back into dating after his divorce and has a hard time meeting the right women. But he lucks out with online dating and meets a fellow lawyer. The two agree to meet in the flesh, but the woman he meets -- an escaped African-American convict named Charlene (Queen Latifah) -- is not what he expected. Peter is freaked out, but Charlene convinces him

programme.title: The Other Woman
programme.desc: New York lawyer Carly Whitten (Cameron Diaz) lives by strict rules when it comes to romantic relationships, but when she falls for suave, handsome Mark King (Nikolaj Coster-Waldau), she begins an affair with him. programme.title: No Hard Feelings
programme.desc: On the brink of losing her childhood home, a desperate woman agrees to date a wealthy couple's introverted and awkward 19-year-old son. However, he proves to be more of a challenge than she expected, and time is running out before she loses it all.

programme.title: Barb & Star Go to Vista Del Mar
programme.desc: Lifelong friends Barb and Star embark on the adventure of a lifetime when they decide to leave their small Midwestern town for the first time ever.

programme.title: The Ox-Bow Incident
programme.desc: In this classic Western, wanderers Gil Carter (Henry Fonda) and Art Croft (Henry Morgan) ride into a small Nevada town plagued by cattle thieves. Initially suspected of being the rustlers themselves, Carter and Croft eventually join a posse out to get the criminals, who also may be involved in a recent shooting. When the posse closes in on a group that could be the fugitives, they must decide on a

programme.title: The Seven Year Itch
programme.desc: In the midst of a summer heat wave, New Yorker Richard Sherman (Tom Ewell) ships his wife, Helen (Evelyn Keyes), and their son off to Maine for vacation. Left alone to work back in Manhattan, Richard encounters a gorgeous blonde model (Marilyn Monroe) who has moved into the apartment upstairs, and becomes immediately infatuated. While pondering infidelity, Richard dreams of his beautiful new neigh

programme.title: Two for the Road
programme.desc: Architect Mark Wallace (Albert Finney) and his wife, Joanna (Audrey Hepburn), travel to France to meet with an affluent client (Claude Dauphin). While there, they reflect on their first decade of marriage -- memories of when they first met, of courtship and of road trips through the French countryside. As flirtation and playful quarreling turn to boredom with the banality of married life, the Wall

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Based on the novel by Richard Hooker, M*A*S*H follows a group of Mobile Army Surgical Hospital officers at they perform surgery and pass the time just miles from the front lines of the Korean Conflict. Led by Captains Hawkeye Pierce (Donald Sutherland) and Trapper John McIntyre (Elliott Gould), they add to the chaos and hilarity of the situation.

programme.title: Quintet
programme.desc: A frozen wasteland is the scene of an unusual game of life or death where the victims fight to remain alive.

programme.title: Alita: Battle Angel
programme.desc: Set several centuries in the future, the abandoned Alita is found in the scrapyard of Iron City by Ido, a compassionate cyber-doctor who takes the unconscious cyborg Alita to his clinic. When Alita awakens, she has no memory of who she is, nor does she have any recognition of the world she finds herself in. As Alita learns to navigate her new life and the treacherous streets of Iron City, Ido trie

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: "Spider-Man" centers on student Peter Parker (Tobey Maguire) who, after being bitten by a genetically-altered spider, gains superhuman strength and the spider-like ability to cling to any surface. He vows to use his abilities to fight crime, coming to understand the words of his beloved Uncle Ben: "With great power comes great responsibility.".

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: When a failed nuclear fusion experiment results in an explosion that kills his wife, Dr. Otto Octavius is transformed into Dr. Octopus, a cyborg with deadly metal tentacles. Doc Ock blames Spider-Man for the accident and seeks revenge. Meanwhile, Spidey's alter ego, Peter Parker, faces fading powers and self-doubt. Complicating matters are his best friend's hatred for Spider-Man and his true love'

programme.title: Spider-Man 3
programme.desc: Peter Parker and M.J. seem to finally be on the right track in their complicated relationship, but trouble looms for the superhero and his lover. Peter's Spider-Man suit turns black and takes control of him, not only giving Peter enhanced power but also bringing out the dark side of his personality. He must overcome the suit's influence as two supervillains, Sandman and Venom, rise up to destroy h

programme.title: A League of Their Own
programme.desc: As America's stock of athletic young men is depleted during World War II, a professional all-female baseball league springs up in the Midwest, funded by publicity-hungry candy maker Walter Harvey (Garry Marshall). Competitive sisters Dottie Hinson (Geena Davis) and Kit Keller (Lori Petty) spar with each other, scout Ernie Capadino (Jon Lovitz) and grumpy has-been coach Jimmy Dugan (Tom Hanks) on t

programme.title: Ride Along
programme.desc: For two years, security guard Ben has tried to convince James, a veteran cop, that he is worthy of James' sister, Angela. When Ben is finally accepted into the police academy, James decides to test his mettle by inviting him along on a shift deliberately designed to scare the trainee. However, events take an unexpected turn when their wild night leads to Atlanta's most-notorious criminal and Ben's

programme.title: Ride Along 2
programme.desc: Rookie lawman Ben Barber (Kevin Hart) aspires to become a detective like James Payton (Ice Cube), his future brother-in-law. programme.title: Power Book IV: Force
programme.desc: Tommy and Diamond disagree on business, while Jenard takes the opportunity to introduce another hustle to CBI; Stacy does damage control to salvage her campaign, and Mireya contemplates her future.

programme.title: Power Book IV: Force
programme.desc: While some relationships are mended, other brewing tensions reach their boiling point, setting the stage for unlikely allies.

programme.title: Power Book IV: Force
programme.desc: After a major shakeup, Tommy moves fast to rebuild, and the stakes are higher than ever.

programme.title: Power Book IV: Force

programme.title: Power Book IV: Force

When the star tailback, Boobie Miles (Derek Luke), is seriously injured during the first game of the season, all hope is lost, and the town's dormant social problems begin to flare up. It is left to the inspiring abilities of new coach Gary Gaines (Billy Bob Thornton) to instill in the other team

programme.desc: Filmmaker Josh Fox examines the potential long-term environmental impact of hydraulic fracturing, including poisonous water and earthquakes.

programme.title: Fantastic Beasts: A Natural History
programme.desc: Delving into the mythological, including dragons, mermaids, and unicorns -- alongside examinations of natural world beasts, such as vervet monkeys, narwhals, and manatees; Stephen Fry travels far and wide to learn about such animals.

programme.title: Night Is Not Eternal
programme.desc: Night Is Not Eternal is a deeply personal exploration of political activism through the eyes of Chinese American filmmaker Nanfu Wang. For over seven years, Nanfu follows Rosa Maria Paya, a young Cuban activist and daughter of five-time Nobel Peace Prize nominee Oswaldo Paya, in her fight for democratic change in Cuba. Driven by her own experiences in China, Nanfu is drawn to Rosa's story and the

programme.title: MacGruber
programme.desc: In the decade since his fiancée was killed, an Army Ranger, Green Beret and Navy SEAL rolled into one has sworn off fighting crime, preferring instead to rock his mullet as a man of peace. But when his sworn enemy, Dieter Von Cunth, steals a nuclear warhead, only MacGruber and his crack team of experts are equal to the task of bringing the villain to justice.

programme.title: Fackham Hall
programme.desc: Eric Noone begins a forbidden romance with Rose Davenport, the lady of the house at a posh English manor. When an unexpected murder occurs, Eric gets framed, leaving Rose and her family's future uncertain.

programme.title: Mickey 17
programme.desc: A disposable employee is sent on a human expedition to colonize the ice world Niflheim. After one iteration dies, a new body is regenerated with most of his memories intact.

programme.title: Sorry, Baby
programme.desc: Something terrible happened to Agnes. But life goes on for everyone else. When a friend visits on the brink of an important milestone, Agnes realizes how stuck she's been, in this bittersweet story of finding your way after your world comes crashing down.

programme.title: Wedding Crashers
programme.desc: Jeremy (Vince Vaughn) and John (Owen Wilson) are divorce mediators who spend their free time crashing wedding receptions. For the irrepressible duo, there are few better ways to drink for free and bed vulnerable women. programme.title: Girls Trip
programme.desc: Best friends Ryan, Sasha, Lisa and Dina are in for the adventure of a lifetime when they travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival. Along the way, they rekindle their sisterhood and rediscover their wild side by doing enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

programme.title: Bride of Frankenstein
programme.desc: After recovering from injuries sustained in the mob attack upon himself and his creation, Dr. Frankenstein (Colin Clive) falls under the control of his former mentor, Dr. Pretorius (Ernest Thesiger), who insists the now-chastened doctor resume his experiments in creating new life. programme.title: A United Kingdom
programme.desc: In the 1940s, Prince Seretse Khama of Botswana shocks the world when he marries a white woman from London.

programme.title: The Curse of Frankenstein
programme.desc: Victor Frankenstein (Peter Cushing) is a brilliant scientist willing to stop at nothing in his quest to reanimate a deceased body. A time traveler risks his life to change the course of history and save the future of humanity.

programme.title: X-Men: First Class
programme.desc: In the early 1960s, during the height of the Cold War, a mutant named Charles Xavier (James McAvoy) meets a fellow mutant named Erik Lehnsherr (Michael Fassbender). Despite their vastly different backgrounds -- Charles grew up with a wealthy family, while Erik lost his parents at Auschwitz -- the two become close friends. As the world teeters on the brink of a nuclear war, Charles and Erik with ot

programme.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
programme.desc: With their headquarters destroyed and the world held hostage, members of Kingsman find new allies when they discover a spy organization in the United States known as Statesman. In an adventure that tests their strength and wits, the elite secret agents from both sides of the pond band together to battle a ruthless enemy and save the day, something that's becoming a bit of a habit for Eggsy.

programme.title: Mavis!
programme.desc: The life, music, and message of singer Mavis Staples.

programme.title: Music Box
programme.desc: Jason Isbell's musical evolution and creative process as he goes into the studio to record his album "Reunions" with his band, The 400 Unit; Isbell lays bare his childhood, struggles with addiction and relationships, funneling it into his music.

programme.title: Music Box: Counting Crows: Have You Seen Me Lately?
programme.desc: After their debut album's success, Counting Crows and singer Adam Duritz became global rockstars; interviews and 90s footage show how they navigated sudden fame while staying true to their art.

programme.title: Whitney Houston: I Wanna Dance With Somebody
programme.desc: Discovered by record executive Clive Davis, Whitney Houston rises to fame in the 1980s to become one of the greatest singers of her generation.

programme.title: Meg 2: The Trench
programme.desc: Jonas Taylor leads a research team on an exploratory dive into the deepest depths of the ocean. Their voyage spirals into chaos when a malevolent mining operation threatens their mission and forces them into a high-stakes battle for survival. Pitted against colossal, prehistoric sharks and relentless environmental plunderers, they must outrun, outsmart and outswim their merciless predators.

programme.title: Call Me by Your Name
programme.desc: It's the summer of 1983, and precocious 17-year-old Elio Perlman is spending the days with his family at their 17th-century villa in Lombardy, Italy. He soon meets Oliver, a handsome doctoral student who's working as an intern for Elio's father. Amid the sun-drenched splendor of their surroundings, Elio and Oliver discover the heady beauty of awakening desire over the course of a summer that will

programme.title: Atomic Blonde
programme.desc: Sensual and savage, Lorraine Broughton is the most elite spy in MI6, an agent who's willing to use all of her lethal skills to stay alive during an impossible mission. With the Berlin Wall about to fall, she travels into the heart of the city to retrieve a priceless dossier and take down a ruthless espionage ring. Once there, she teams up with an embedded station chief to navigate her way through

programme.title: Nine Lives
programme.desc: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family,

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
programme.desc: All is well at Mossy Bottom Farm, except for the fact that the animals will do anything to get out of work. So, Shaun the sheep and his scheming friends devise a plan to put their master to sleep. However, the ruse backfires when the poor farmer finds himself transported to the big city, having lost his memory. Now, it's up to Sean, Timmy the lamb, Shirley the ewe and the rest of the gang to trave

programme.title: Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Long before meeting Shrek, Puss in Boots, just named a hero for saving a woman from a charging bull, is run out of town on suspicion of bank robbery, even though the real villain is Puss' friend, Humpty Dumpty. Though there is still animosity between them, Puss and Humpty reunite to steal a goose that lays golden eggs. Joining them for the adventure of nine lifetimes is notorious cat burglar, Kitt

programme.title: Architecton
programme.desc: A hypnotic, propulsive odyssey through the foundations of the modern world, following mountains as they are turned into concrete and buildings as they are turned into rubble.

programme.title: Music Box: Happy and You Know It
programme.desc: Featuring a colorful and charming cast and their toe-tapping songs, the film reframes children's music as a misunderstood yet vital cultural art form that influences how kids develop; it chronicles the unexpected paths artists take to embrace the creative freedom found in writing music that shapes childhoods.

programme.title: A Most Violent Year
programme.desc: In 1981 New York, a fuel supplier (Oscar Isaac) tries to adhere to his own moral compass amid the rampant violence, corruption and decay that threaten his family and his business.

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: "This Is Spinal Tap" shines a light on the self-contained universe of a metal band struggling to get back on the charts, including everything from its complicated history of ups and downs, gold albums, name changes and undersold concert dates, along with the full host of requisite groupies, promoters, hangers-on and historians, sessions, release events and those special behind-the-scenes moments t

programme.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
programme.desc: Documentarian Marty DiBergi follows estranged Spinal Tap bandmates David St. Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel and Derek Smalls as they search for a drummer and prepare for a reunion concert in New Orleans. Joined by music royalty Paul McCartney and Elton John, Spinal Tap wrestles with their checkered past to put on a show they hope will solidify their place in the pantheon of rock 'n' roll.

programme.title: AVP: Alien vs. Predator
programme.desc: When the wealthy and ambitious Charles Bishop Weyland funds an expedition to Antarctica, he hopes to find a mysterious source of heat that has been detected. Led by a tough guide, Alexa Woods, Weyland and his team uncover a pyramid, but they also find malevolent parasitic aliens. Making matters worse, another extraterrestrial species, known as Predators, arrive to hunt the other aliens, with the h

programme.title: Aliens vs. Predator: Requiem
programme.desc: Residents (Steven Pasquale, Reiko Aylesworth, John Ortiz) of Gunnison, Colorado, are caught up in the crossfire when two deadly extraterrestrial species bring their longstanding conflict to Earth. On the one side, nearly indestructible Aliens; on the other, a lone Predator whose mission is to wipe out all traces of the Alien infestation from Earth, no matter who gets in the way.

programme.title: Prometheus
programme.desc: The discovery of a clue to mankind's origins on Earth leads a team of explorers to the darkest parts of the universe. Two brilliant young scientists lead the expedition. Shaw hopes that they will meet a race of benevolent, godlike beings who will in some way verify her religious beliefs, while Holloway is out to debunk any spiritual notions. However, neither the scientists nor their shipmates are

programme.title: Alien: Covenant
programme.desc: Bound for a remote planet on the far side of the galaxy, members (Katherine Waterston, Billy Crudup) of the colony ship Covenant discover what they think to be an uncharted paradise. While there, they meet David (Michael Fassbender), the synthetic survivor of the doomed Prometheus expedition. The mysterious world soon turns dark and dangerous when a hostile alien life-form forces the crew into a d

programme.title: True Grit
programme.desc: One-eyed Marshal "Rooster" Cogburn (John Wayne) and a Texas Ranger (Glen Campbell) help a girl (Kim Darby) find her father's killer.

programme.title: Rio Conchos
programme.desc: A cavalry captain (Stuart Whitman), an ex-Rebel (Richard Boone), a Mexican killer (Tony Franciosa) and a soldier hunt a madman running guns to Apaches.

programme.title: The Violent Men
programme.desc: A rancher (Glenn Ford) fights a land-grabbing cattle baron (Edward G. Robinson) whose wife (Barbara Stanwyck) and brother are having an affair.

programme.title: A Man Called Sledge
programme.desc: Two outlaws (James Garner, Dennis Weaver) stage a prison break to steal a fortune in gold dust guarded by the Army.

programme.title: The Secret of Convict Lake
programme.desc: In 1871, a group of escaped convicts descends upon a small mountain settlement occupied only by women.

programme.title: Belle Starr, the Bandit Queen
programme.desc: The Southerner (Gene Tierney) and her husband (Randolph Scott) are still fighting the Civil War, chased by a Union major (Dana Andrews) smitten with Belle.

programme.title: The Second Time Around
programme.desc: A 1912 New York widow (Debbie Reynolds) with children becomes the umbrella-toting sheriff of a wild Arizona town.

programme.title: Island in the Sky
programme.desc: A secretary (Gloria Stuart) solves a murder for her boyfriend (Michael Whalen) in the district attorney's office.

programme.title: Phone Call From a Stranger
programme.desc: A lawyer (Gary Merrill) meets three people on a plane, then calls on their families with bad news after it crashes.

programme.title: Suspense
programme.desc: A skating star dallies with a tough guy who grabs her husband's ice palace over his dead body.

programme.title: The Letter
programme.desc: A woman (Bette Davis) in Malaya kills a man, telling her husband (Herbert Marshall) and lawyer (James Stephenson) it was self-defense.

programme.title: Violent Saturday
programme.desc: Three violent hoodlums shatter the calm of a peaceful Arizona community when they attempt a bloody bank heist.

programme.title: Mystery Street
programme.desc: A Harvard doctor's (Bruce Bennett) study of a female skeleton leads a Boston police detective (Ricardo Montalban) to a killer.

programme.title: Marked Woman
programme.desc: A prosecutor (Humphrey Bogart) has a clip-joint hostess (Bette Davis) and her four co-workers testify against their boss.

programme.title: Where the Sidewalk Ends
programme.desc: A police detective (Dana Andrews) beats a suspect to death, then tries to pin it on a mob boss (Gary Merrill).

programme.title: Moontide
programme.desc: A hard-drinking dockworker (Jean Gabin), who may have killed a man, tries to make a new life with a waitress (Ida Lupino) he saved from a suicide attempt.

programme.title: Scene of the Crime
programme.desc: A Los Angeles police detective (Van Johnson) hunts killer bookies, as his wife (Arlene Dahl) urges him to quit.

programme.title: Shock
programme.desc: A psychiatrist (Vincent Price) and a nurse (Lynn Bari) treat a veteran's (Frank Latimore) wife who has seen them kill the psychiatrist's wife.

programme.title: Love and Bullets
programme.desc: The FBI sends a loner (Charles Bronson) to kidnap a mobster's (Rod Steiger) mistress (Jill Ireland) in Switzerland.

programme.title: 100 Rifles
programme.desc: A sheriff (Jim Brown) helps a bank robber (Burt Reynolds) and a Yaqui beauty (Raquel Welch) fight a tyrant general in 1912 Mexico.

programme.title: Compulsion
programme.desc: In a retelling of the Leopold and Loeb murders, two men murder a younger boy and are subsequently put on trial.

programme.title: Hush... Hush, Sweet Charlotte
programme.desc: Half-mad Charlotte (Bette Davis) lives in a Louisiana mansion with her greedy cousin (Olivia de Havilland) and family doctor (Joseph Cotten).

programme.title: Whatever Happened to Aunt Alice?
programme.desc: An Arizona widow (Geraldine Page) bilks her maids, kills them and uses them for garden fertilizer; Alice (Ruth Gordon) finds out.

programme.title: Magic
programme.desc: A neurotic ventriloquist's belief that his stage dummy controls his actions leads him to murder, madness and more.

programme.title: Perry Mason: The Case of the All-Star Assassin
programme.desc: Lawyer Mason (Raymond Burr) takes the case of an injured hockey player accused of killing a sports tycoon.

programme.title: Pacific Heights
programme.desc: San Francisco yuppies (Melanie Griffith, Matthew Modine) restore a costly Victorian, then rent a studio to a landlord's nightmare (Michael Keaton).

programme.title: The Medusa Touch
programme.desc: A French detective (Lino Ventura) asks a psychiatrist (Lee Remick) about an Englishman (Richard Burton) with the power to cause disaster.

programme.title: The Lawnmower Man
programme.desc: A scientist uses an intellectually disabled gardener as a guinea pig in his experiments with intelligence enhancing drugs and virtual reality. The man transforms into a genius, but not without side effects.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Greece, the Intercity Express travels from Thessaloniki to Athens, passing sites like the Meteora peaks, Delphi ruins and the Acropolis; the journey continues to the Peloponnese on Greece's last cogwheel train.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: The trio heads to Scotland as Gordon prepares to cook a feast for the chief of Clan Ramsay and his friends. Gordon shows the others how to dress like real Scotsmen as they go in search of Scottish beef, hunt for scallops and play some Highland Games.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred start their road trip in Gino's homeland of Italy, where Gino needs help to pull off an event that is close to his heart. Gino collects Gordon and Fred in a campervan to begin a road trip they won't be forgetting in a hurry.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred travel to France, where Fred has been asked to co-host an Oyster Festival in the beautiful Arcachon Bay, in just four days' time. Reunited with their campervan, Fred nominates himself as the driver in his homeland.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: The trio heads to Scotland as Gordon prepares to cook a feast for the chief of Clan Ramsay and his friends. Gordon shows the others how to dress like real Scotsmen as they go in search of Scottish beef, hunt for scallops and play some Highland Games.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Andalusia, now crossed by high-speed and modernized rail lines, unveils its rich culture and landscapes; along the journey, we visit cities like Seville, Granada with its famed Alhambra and Guadix near the Tabernas desert.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred travel to Greece to immerse themselves in the culinary traditions. The taste buddies go island-hopping, keen to learn more about the Mediterranean diet and how the country has one of the healthiest populations in the world.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: The boys are in the Greek capital Athens in a vintage VW campervan. This is where high-concept cuisine originated & is still being re-invented, in a city known as the birth place of democracy and the cradle of western civilisation.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: On a mission to taste the worlds best breakfast, the three big egos Gordon, Gino and Fred are venturing out of their comfort zones crossing over the USA boarder into Mexico. They hope to stay out of trouble as they drive their bad boy transporter.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon wants to show Fred & Gino that the food and fresh produce are off the charts! In Las Vegas they indulge in one of the most expensive beef burgers. After a night at the casino they're on the road again to experience the real wild west.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie visits Basilicata in search of some old school Italian recipes and meets a family of shepherds and an 89-year-old macaroni master.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie is taking spaghetti bolognese to the next level and re-creating a mind-blowing Jewish-Italian recipe. There's also beef stew with pappardelle.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie returns to cooking the food he loves the most, getting right to heart of the Italian kitchen.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie visits Basilicata in search of some old school Italian recipes and meets a family of shepherds and an 89-year-old macaroni master.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie is taking spaghetti bolognese to the next level and re-creating a mind-blowing Jewish-Italian recipe. There's also beef stew with pappardelle.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gino & Fred are excited to head to San Francisco for their very own Summer of Love. Gordon tries to embrace the flower power mood, but he's more interested in the 61 Michelin Stars. The boys travel to a Napa Valley vineyard in a hot air balloon.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: After four weeks on the road, Gino's airing his feet in the back seat as the guys cruise along a Texan highway. Texas is a meat lover's paradise, and Gordon is keen to show the Europhiles some of the best BBQ known to man.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie is high up in the Italian Alps cooking some great comfort food, including dumplings, mind-blowing macaroni cheese, and a classic red wine and sausage risotto.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie tracks down some fast, fresh and easy recipes, featuring tasty minty pea tortiglioni and gnocchi with roasted tomato sauce and rocket pesto.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie gets a masterclass in Sicilian sweets and cooking up an epic tuna, prawn and pistachio spaghetti. There's also some chocolaty cannoli.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Chris Bavin takes Fred to the New Forest, where fresh local produce is king. Featuring wood-fired cooking, pork pies and a country pub serving the perfect Ploughman's.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Food writer Rachel Khoo takes Fred to Vienna to experience exquisite coffee and cake, comforting dumplings, and mangalitza pork schnitzel.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: TV Chef Andi Oliver takes Fred to Marrakech to enjoy lamb and couscous at legendary restaurant, chicken tagine for under £10, and breakfast on a roof terrace.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Chris Bavin takes Fred to the New Forest, where fresh local produce is king. Featuring wood-fired cooking, pork pies and a country pub serving the perfect Ploughman's.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Food writer Rachel Khoo takes Fred to Vienna to experience exquisite coffee and cake, comforting dumplings, and mangalitza pork schnitzel.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati is in the magic town of Maní to learn about something sacred to the Mayans - bees and honey. A group of women who protect the endangered Melipona, a stingless bee native to Yucatán, invites her to join in a Mayan energy cleansing ritual.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Tekit, the capital of the Guayabera, Pati encounters a tale of sons going against their father's wishes to follow their own path. Pati meets a farmer's son who went against his father to build a family business making the iconic Guayabera shirts.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati explores the streets of Yucatán's capital, Mérida. She tries the best tacos in Mérida at Wayan'e. The aroma of freshly made cookies lures her to Dondé Fabric, where their globitos and bizcochitos are an important part of Mérida's mornings.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati visits Chef Wilson Alonzo in his hometown of Halachó to prepare a traditional Cochinita Pibil in an underground pit. Pati helps Wilson prepare the achiote marinade, along with his grandmother who taught him traditional cooking.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati arrives in Motul, a town in the history books for Yucatán's once thriving henequén industry and for the egg dish Huevos Motuleños. Pati meets Doña Evelia, who put Motul back on the map with her world-famous recipe.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Temozón is the birthplace of Yucatán's signature smoked meat Carne Ahumada and everyone in town claims to have a relative who invented it. Pati strolls around town to try different versions of Carne Ahumada.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati returns to Mérida to meet sisters, Delia and Maria Elide, who love to cook and laugh and are famous for recados - pastes of spices and aromatic herbs that season Yucatecan foods. In Uxmal, she learns about ingredients that make recados unique.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: No trip to Yucatán is complete without seeing a beautiful cenote, natural freshwater pools in caves. To learn more about Mayan communities, Pati visits Cenote Xocempich with lawyer Zoila Cen, who has dedicated her career to helping Mayan people.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: An ingredient Pati constantly uses is salt and Yucatán has one of the most unique salts. The Las Coloradas salt, which means blush red, gets its distinctive color from red algae. Felipe Perez takes Pati to the pink lakes where the salt is produced.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Yaxunah, Pati discovers Yucatán's league of their own. She joins the Amazonas, a softball team of indigenous women, for their morning practice. As they built a name for themselves, they overcame the mindset that women belong in the kitchen.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: We visit the United Kingdom, a nation recognized for its rich history and classic regal elegance, and two hotels that embody the very best of these values despite very different locations.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: Today we have two different hotel experiences in the bustling country of Japan. Hotels that combine elements of past and present Japan to create a sophisticated and luxurious experience in the heart of the city.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: In Thailand, are the Anantara Golden Triangle and Elephant Camp Resort. Attracting guests who desire luxury and adventure. In the Philippines lies Villa Escudero Plantation and Resort. This picturesque and tranquil Villa is brimming with character.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: Today we visit two hotels that use their stunning coastal locations, award-winning design, and friendly staff to charm their guests to create unforgettable once-in-a-lifetime experiences.
